channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead Rat, 19th March
item.description:
Please make sure there is no rat infestation in this area.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: West end Brondesbury villas, 19th March
item.description:
Large amounts of construction stuff

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Glass shards and codeine bottles in communal areas, 19th March
item.description:
House 9 is constantly throwing trash through thei window. I have cleaned some of the bottles I could, and swept the main shards just because it is literally on our pathway to the door. THere are deifinitely more trash left in the gard/green area too. Constant littering trash flying from the same window.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gataker Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface breaking up and showering stones on to pavement!, 19th March
item.description:
The road was fixed over a year ago. But since Superloop buses new route the surface is breaking up. Causing surface stones to fly on to pavement. Also causing vibration and bad surface noise. This goes from 72 7068 66 64. Down the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Penhill Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 19th March
item.description:
Sheets of MDF and bag of builder's rubbish by tree.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Foxberry Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas Bottles, 19th March
item.description:
Two gas bottles dumped on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Olyffe Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden Waste Bins not in use, 19th March
item.description:
There are 2-3 brown bins here. Nobody has subscribed to the garden waste collection service so they have been left here and not been emptied for over a year. They are now overflowing and attracting pests. Please can you remove the brown bins.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is branches hat have been cut by one of communication companies, 19th March
item.description:
There a safety concern from branches that have been cu by communication company left in tree. There a few that's already fallen n o road in wind . There still plenty in th tree couple quite large would cause n accident to pasing motorists

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yorkland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree branch/trunk causing obstruction, 19th March
item.description:
There is a large tree branch/trunk down that is completely blocking the pavement and also half of the road. This is causing large queues on Yester Road and Lubbock road in rush hour.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yester Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repaired, 19th March
item.description:
Road repaired by gang as instructed by inspector. Needs inspecting again please. As shown in picture the concrete base under road surface is still showing through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Hayfield Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crate left outside my home, 19th March
item.description:
18 marcia road, london, se1 5xf. Crate left outside my home

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marcia Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 19th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Black Renault GY61 DJK no tax, blocking the whole road making access to residents driveway impossible., 19th March
item.description:
Black Renault GY61 DJK no tax, blocking the whole road making access to residents driveway impossible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamilton Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicles 2 off., 19th March
item.description:
Two vehicles abandoned in car park of Essex tower, both vehicles have parked in same location for over 12 months The rear doors of the van are now open and some of the contents have been disposed off in the car park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornish Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle for months, 19th March
item.description:
Car under tarpaulin has been abandoned and has no tax or mot and has been left from way before Christmas. Not taxed or motd since sept/oct. In a small road taking up valuable space.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Potter Close, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp in Whitehall recreation ground not working, 19th March
item.description:
Lamp in Whitehall recreation ground not working - on path on south side of park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitehall Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Scattered food rubbish in front of barber shop, 19th March
item.description:
Food rubbish scattered on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned bike in location ///solve.roof.plays, 19th March
item.description:
Abandoned bike in this what3words location ///solve.roof.plays

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Dumped bin outside the school entrance, 19th March
item.description:
Dumped bin outside the school entrance being used daily has no lid and full of bugs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Augustines Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped., 19th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on grass verge of. This area has an ongoing problem with flytippers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birch Row, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
